sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n65717" key="meili/xh" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">μειλίχ-η</orth> [<foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ῐ], <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen></foreign>, <sense id="n65717.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">boxing-glove which left the fingers bare</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0525.tlg001.perseus-grc1:8:40:3" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Paus.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">8.40.3</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
